free_text: Additional measurements of the radiative capture cross
Samples in pure or compound form were mounted in thin
polyethylene foils and irradiated together with monitor
The beta counting rate was corrected for counting
efficiency, scattering and absorption, for the gammas
the photo peak efficiency was taken into account
Errors indicated are due to statistics,
half-life error and error of standard cross-sections.
Data received from Csikai, priv com
